summary: Adds user/local config discovery, ships remote release checks, and formalizes stripped production builds for smaller downloads.
highlights: New `reserve update check` command for release status, highlights, and static upgrade instructions
Per-user config discovery on Linux, macOS, and Windows, with local ./config.json override precedence
`reserve config init` now creates the user config file and parent directories automatically
`reserve config set` now updates a local override when present, otherwise the user config file
Release artifacts use stripped production builds for smaller downloads
update_instructions: Download the latest release from the GitHub releases page or rerun the install script from download.reservecli.dev.
